title: Review session recording now posted
content:
The recording for the review session that we did this morning (Oct 17) is now posted. Pls see the bottom of Week 9 page. Please note that I didn't post the Excel spreadsheet that I used in the recording. You'd have to watch the recording and create your own.

 

Happy studying and please let me know if you have questions.

Julian
